raw_sql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN amount < 500 THEN '1. <500'
    WHEN amount < 1000 THEN '2. 500-999'
    WHEN amount < 2000 THEN '3. 1000-1999'
    WHEN amount < 5000 THEN '4. 2000-4999'
    WHEN amount < 10000 THEN '5. 5000-9999'
    ELSE '6. 10000+'
  END AS cost_bracket,
  COUNT(*) AS num_expenses,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 2) AS avg_processing_days,
  ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 2) AS min_days,
  ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 2) AS max_days,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 2) AS median_days
FROM flag_25
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bracket
ORDER BY cost_bracket;
template:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS cost_bracket,
  COUNT(*) AS num_expenses,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_processing_days,
  ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS min_days,
  ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS max_days,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS median_days
FROM flag_25
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bracket
ORDER BY cost_bracket;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (amount < 500) THEN '1. <500'::text WHEN (amount < 1000) THEN '2. 500-999'::text WHEN (amount < 2000) THEN '3. 1000-1999'::text WHEN (amount < 5000) THEN '4. 2000-4999'::text WHEN (amount < 10000) THEN '5. 5000-9999'::text ELSE '6. 10000+'::text END)

predicates: ((processed_date IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT
  department,
  CASE
    WHEN amount < 1000 THEN 'Low (<1000)'
    WHEN amount < 5000 THEN 'Mid (1000-4999)'
    ELSE 'High (5000+)'
  END AS cost_bracket,
  COUNT(*) AS num_expenses,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 2) AS avg_days
FROM flag_25
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department, cost_bracket
ORDER BY department, cost_bracket;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  ROUND(amount / 500.0) * 500 AS amount_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS num_expenses,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 2) AS avg_days
FROM flag_25
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY amount_bucket
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY amount_bucket;

FROM flag_25

raw_sql:
SELECT
  ROUND(CORR(amount, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 4) AS pearson_corr,
  ROUND(CORR(LN(amount + 1), EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 4) AS log_corr,
  ROUND(REGR_SLOPE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400, amount)::numeric, 6) AS slope_days_per_dollar,
  ROUND(REGR_INTERCEPT(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400, amount)::numeric, 4) AS intercept_days,
  ROUND(REGR_R2(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400, amount)::numeric, 4) AS r_squared
FROM flag_25
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL;
template:
SELECT
  ROUND(CORR(amount, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS pearson_corr,

  ROUND(REGR_SLOPE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n, amount)::numeric, ?n) AS slope_days_per_dollar,
  ROUND(REGR_INTERCEPT(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n, amount)::numeric, ?n) AS intercept_days,
  ROUND(REGR_R2(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n, amount)::numeric, ?n) AS r_squared
FROM flag_25
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400 AS processing_days,
  COUNT(*) AS num_expenses,
  ROUND(AVG(amount)::numeric, 0) AS avg_amount,
  MIN(amount) AS min_amount,
  MAX(amount) AS max_amount
FROM flag_25
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY processing_days
ORDER BY processing_days;
template:

  MIN(amount) AS min_amount,
  MAX(amount) AS max_amount

GROUP BY processing_days

raw_sql:
SELECT
  processing_days,
  MIN(amount) AS min_amount,
  MAX(amount) AS max_amount,
  MAX(amount) - MIN(amount) AS range_width,
  LAG(MIN(amount)) OVER (ORDER BY processing_days DESC) - MAX(amount) AS gap_to_next_tier
FROM (
  SELECT
    amount,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400 AS processing_days
  FROM flag_25
  WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
) sub
GROUP BY processing_days
ORDER BY processing_days;
template:
SELECT
  processing_days,

  MAX(amount) AS max_amount,
  MAX(amount) - MIN(amount) AS range_width,
  LAG(MIN(amount)) OVER (ORDER BY processing_days DESC) - MAX(amount) AS gap_to_next_tier
FROM (
  SELECT
    amount,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n AS processing_days
  FROM flag_25
  WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
) sub
GROUP BY processing_days
ORDER BY processing_days;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  processing_days,
  amount,
  ROUND((34.5333 - 0.003822 * amount)::numeric, 0) AS predicted_days,
  ROUND((34.5333 - 0.003822 * amount)::numeric, 2) AS predicted_raw,
  ROUND((34.5333 - 0.003822 * amount)::numeric, 0) - processing_days AS error
FROM (
  SELECT
    amount,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400 AS processing_days
  FROM flag_25
  WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
) sub
WHERE ABS(ROUND((34.5333 - 0.003822 * amount)::numeric, 0) - processing_days) > 0
ORDER BY error DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT
  processing_days,
  amount,
  ROUND((?n - ?n * amount)::numeric, ?n) AS predicted_days,
  ROUND((?n - ?n * amount)::numeric, ?n) AS predicted_raw,
  ROUND((?n - ?n * amount)::numeric, ?n) - processing_days AS error
FROM (
  SELECT
    amount,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n AS processing_days
  FROM flag_25
  WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
) sub
WHERE ABS(ROUND((?n - ?n * amount)::numeric, ?n) - processing_days) > ?n
ORDER BY error DESC
LIMIT ?n;

predicates: ((processed_date IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (abs((round((34.5333 - (0.003822 * (amount)::numeric)), 0) - (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / '86400'::numeric))) > '0'::numeric))

raw_sql:
SELECT
  processing_days,
  amount,
  (35 - processing_days) AS days_subtracted,
  ROUND((amount::numeric / (35 - processing_days)), 2) AS implied_divisor
FROM (
  SELECT
    amount,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400 AS processing_days
  FROM flag_25
  WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
) sub
WHERE processing_days < 35
ORDER BY implied_divisor
LIMIT 30;
template:
SELECT
  processing_days,
  amount,
  (?n - processing_days) AS days_subtracted,
  ROUND((amount::numeric / (?n - processing_days)), ?n) AS implied_divisor
FROM (
  SELECT
    amount,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n AS processing_days
  FROM flag_25
  WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
) sub
WHERE processing_days < ?n
ORDER BY implied_divisor
LIMIT ?n;

predicates: ((processed_date IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND ((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / '86400'::numeric) < '35'::numeric))

raw_sql:
SELECT
  k,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ROUND((35.0 - amount::numeric / k)) = processing_days) AS exact_matches,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ABS(ROUND((35.0 - amount::numeric / k)) - processing_days) <= 1) AS within_1_day
FROM (
  SELECT amount, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400 AS processing_days
  FROM flag_25
  WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
) sub
CROSS JOIN (SELECT generate_series(200, 320) AS k) ks
GROUP BY k
ORDER BY exact_matches DESC, within_1_day DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT
  k,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ROUND((?n - amount::numeric / k)) = processing_days) AS exact_matches,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ABS(ROUND((?n - amount::numeric / k)) - processing_days) <= ?n) AS within_1_day
FROM (
  SELECT amount, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n AS processing_days
  FROM flag_25
  WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
) sub
CROSS JOIN (SELECT generate_series(?n, ?n) AS k) ks
GROUP BY k
ORDER BY exact_matches DESC, within_1_day DESC
LIMIT ?n;

predicates: ((processed_date IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT
  formula,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE predicted = processing_days) AS exact_matches,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE predicted = processing_days) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_exact
FROM (
  SELECT
    processing_days,
    amount,
    ROUND(34.5333 - 0.003822 * amount) AS predicted,
    'ROUND(34.53 - 0.003822*amount)' AS formula
  FROM (
    SELECT amount, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400 AS processing_days
    FROM flag_25 WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
  ) sub
  UNION ALL
  SELECT processing_days, amount,
    FLOOR(34.5333 - 0.003822 * amount),
    'FLOOR(34.53 - 0.003822*amount)'
  FROM (
    SELECT amount, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400 AS processing_days
    FROM flag_25 WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
  ) sub
  UNION ALL
  SELECT processing_days, amount,
    CEIL(34.5333 - 0.003822 * amount),
    'CEIL(34.53 - 0.003822*amount)'
  FROM (
    SELECT amount, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400 AS processing_days
    FROM flag_25 WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
  ) sub
) f
GROUP BY formula
ORDER BY exact_matches DESC;
template:
SELECT
  formula,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE predicted = processing_days) AS exact_matches,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE predicted = processing_days) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_exact
FROM (
  SELECT
    processing_days,
    amount,
    ROUND(?n - ?n * amount) AS predicted,
    ?s AS formula
  FROM (
    SELECT amount, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n AS processing_days
    FROM flag_25 WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
  ) sub
  UNION ALL
  SELECT processing_days, amount,
    FLOOR(?n - ?n * amount),
    ?s
  FROM (
    SELECT amount, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n AS processing_days
    FROM flag_25 WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
  ) sub
  UNION ALL
  SELECT processing_days, amount,
    CEIL(?n - ?n * amount),
    ?s
  FROM (
    SELECT amount, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n AS processing_days
    FROM flag_25 WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
  ) sub
) f
GROUP BY formula
ORDER BY exact_matches DESC;

predicates: ((processed_date IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT
  MIN(amount) AS min_amount,
  MAX(amount) AS max_amount,
  MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400) AS min_days,
  MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400) AS max_days,
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400) AS distinct_day_values,
  COUNT(DISTINCT amount) AS distinct_amounts
FROM flag_25
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  ROUND(amount / 500.0) * 500 AS amount_bucket,
  department,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 2) AS avg_days,
  ROUND(STDDEV(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 2) AS stddev_days
FROM flag_25
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY amount_bucket, department
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY amount_bucket, avg_days;

FROM flag_25
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY amount_bucket, department
HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?n
